nasb.text: The pails, the shovels, the forks and all its utensils, Huram-abi made of polished bronze for King Solomon for the house of the Lord.

esv.text: The pots, the shovels, the forks, and all the equipment for these Huram-abi made of burnished bronze for King Solomon for the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 鍋、鏟、肉叉和一切相關的器皿，都是戶蘭用磨光的銅給所羅門王，為耶和華的殿所做的。

ccb.text: 盆、铲、肉叉及耶和华殿里的一切器具。这些都是巧匠户兰用磨亮的铜为所罗门王制造的。
